h2h.note: Mumbai holds a slight historical edge, but Rajasthan's recent dominance at home and current table-topping form shifts the psychological advantage to the Royals.

RR.trend: Riding high on a perfect start to the season, RR's bowling attack recently showed immense character by defending a high total under pressure against GT.

MI.trend: Struggling to find consistency early on, MI bounced back from an opening win with a loss to DC, highlighting vulnerabilities when defending tricky totals.

squad_news: Hardik Pandya is expected to return to the MI lineup after missing their previous game against Delhi Capitals (ESPNcricinfo).
Vaibhav Suryavanshi is set to face a massive test against Jasprit Bumrah at the top of the order, a key narrative heading into the match (ESPNcricinfo).

key_matchups.insight: The young sensation faces the ultimate test against Bumrah's new-ball variations. Surviving this spell is crucial for RR to set a platform.
A blockbuster clash at the top. Archer's raw pace and bounce against Rohit's aggressive powerplay intent will dictate the momentum of MI's innings.

tactical_edge: RR holds the advantage due to their balanced bowling attack and home conditions, especially if they can post a score above the critical 180-run threshold.

preview_links.title: Sooryavanshi meets Bumrah as RR eye top of the table
